wishes.name: Vinod Nair
wishes.message: Congratulations Akhil and Anjitha! Wishing you both a lifetime of love, laughter, and endless happiness together. Can't wait to celebrate with you!

wishes.name: Dr. Sandeep & Divya
wishes.message: So happy for you two! Wishing you a gorgeous wedding day and an even more wonderful marriage. Cheers to a beautiful journey!

wishes.name: Meera Krishnan
wishes.message: Anjitha, you are going to be the most beautiful bride! Wishing Akhil and you all the blessings in the world. See you at the Kalyanam!

rsvps.name: Vinod Nair
rsvps.message: Excited to attend and bless the couple!

rsvps.name: Rahul Kumar
rsvps.message: Will make it for the Marriage ceremony. Congrats guys!
